name: ThreatConnect
description: Integrate with ThreatConnect TIP to search indicators, groups, cases, and intelligence across your threat library using the v3 API

auth_config.note: HMAC-based auth: header value is TC {ACCESS_ID}:{HMAC_SIGNATURE}. Requires Timestamp header with epoch seconds.

actions.name: Search Indicators
actions.description: Search ThreatConnect indicators with flexible TQL filters for IP, domain, hash, URL, and other IOC types

parameters.name: tql
parameters.description: ThreatConnect Query Language filter (e.g. summary EQ '8.8.8.8' or typeName EQ 'File')

parameters.name: resultLimit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 100, max 10000)

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Additional fields to include in response

actions.name: Enrich Indicator
actions.description: Enrich a specific indicator using ThreatConnect's intelligence aggregation

parameters.name: summary
parameters.description: Indicator value (IP, domain, hash, URL, etc.)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Indicator type (Address, Host, File, URL, EmailAddress)

actions.name: Search Groups
actions.description: Search ThreatConnect groups (threat reports, incidents, campaigns, adversaries, documents)

parameters.name: tql
parameters.description: TQL filter expression (e.g. typeName EQ 'Report' AND dateAdded GT '2024-01-01')

actions.name: Search Cases
actions.description: Search ThreatConnect cases for incident tracking and investigation management

parameters.name: tql
parameters.description: TQL filter expression for case search

actions.name: Get Indicator by ID
actions.description: Retrieve a specific indicator by its ThreatConnect ID with full context

actions.name: Create Indicator
actions.description: Create a new indicator in ThreatConnect with optional tags and attributes

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Indicator type (Address, Host, File, URL, EmailAddress)

actions.name: List Tags
actions.description: List available tags in ThreatConnect for categorization and filtering

parameters.name: tql
parameters.description: TQL filter expression for tag search
